title: Porphyrostachys parviflora
taxonomy: Porphyrostachys parviflora belongs to the family Bromeliaceae, which is a group of flowering plants commonly known as pineapple or air plant family. This epiphytic plant is native to South America and is characterized by its small, white flowers. The classification of Porphyrostachys parviflora is further divided into the genus Porphyrostachys and the species parviflora. Its classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its leaf structure and flower arrangement. As a member of the Bromeliaceae family, Porphyrostachys parviflora is closely related to other plants like pineapples and tillandsias.
